title: Apply original equipment manufacturer repair procedures during vehicle repairs
training_package_name: Automotive Retail, Service and Repair Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Apply original equipment manufacturer repair procedures during vehicle repairs demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Review OEM procedures

pcs.text: Identify job requirements from workplace instructions1.2 Identify required information for repair activity1.3 Identify and confirm relevant procedures and vehicle specifications1.4 Plan repair work to minimise waste and use time efficiently1.5 Analyse OEM or authorised agency repair processes and incorporate into planning process
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify job requirements from workplace instructions1.2 Identify required information for repair activity1.3 Identify and confirm relevant procedures and vehicle specifications1.4 Plan repair work to minimise waste and use time efficiently1.5 Analyse OEM or authorised agency repair processes and incorporate into planning process?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify job requirements from workplace instructions1.2 Identify required information for repair activity1.3 Identify and confirm relevant procedures and vehicle specifications1.4 Plan repair work to minimise waste and use time efficiently1.5 Analyse OEM or authorised agency repair processes and incorporate into planning process.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Review OEM procedures

elements.title: Apply knowledge of OEM standards

pcs.text: Identify hazards associated with the work, assess potential risks and implement control measures in line with workplace policies and procedures 2.2 Locate vehicle and components and prepare for repair work2.3 Identify tools, materials, and equipment required for repair activity and establish serviceability in line with OEM or authorised agency requirements2.4 Carry out repair work according workplace and OEM or authorised agency’s recommended repair procedures and safety and environmental requirements2.5 Identify non-compliances against OEM or authorised agency specifications, and report to appropriate personnel for rectification according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify hazards associated with the work, assess potential risks and implement control measures in line with workplace policies and procedures 2.2 Locate vehicle and components and prepare for repair work2.3 Identify tools, materials, and equipment required for repair activity and establish serviceability in line with OEM or authorised agency requirements2.4 Carry out repair work according workplace and OEM or authorised agency’s recommended repair procedures and safety and environmental requirements2.5 Identify non-compliances against OEM or authorised agency specifications, and report to appropriate personnel for rectification according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify hazards associated with the work, assess potential risks and implement control measures in line with workplace policies and procedures 2.2 Locate vehicle and components and prepare for repair work2.3 Identify tools, materials, and equipment required for repair activity and establish serviceability in line with OEM or authorised agency requirements2.4 Carry out repair work according workplace and OEM or authorised agency’s recommended repair procedures and safety and environmental requirements2.5 Identify non-compliances against OEM or authorised agency specifications, and report to appropriate personnel for rectification according to workplace procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Apply knowledge of OEM standards

elements.title: Complete work processes

pcs.text: Conduct final inspection according to workplace procedures and confirm vehicle is ready for use 3.2 Clear work area and dispose of or recycle materials according to workplace procedures3.3 Complete documentation according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Conduct final inspection according to workplace procedures and confirm vehicle is ready for use 3.2 Clear work area and dispose of or recycle materials according to workplace procedures3.3 Complete documentation according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Conduct final inspection according to workplace procedures and confirm vehicle is ready for use 3.2 Clear work area and dispose of or recycle materials according to workplace procedures3.3 Complete documentation according to workplace procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Complete work processes

evidence_guide.title: Third Party Report — Workplace Supervisor (Required)
evidence_guide.description: Completed by your direct supervisor — the strongest evidence item for RPL.

evidence_guide.title: Position description
evidence_guide.description: Your current position description showing duties relevant to this unit.
